entry.title: Re: Password change by BAPI_USER_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello,

Can I specify target system in parameter of BAPI_USER_CHANGE ? If I test this BAPI I can see box which I can specify target system target system. Named  in 'RFC target sys:'. Which parameter can I set target system ?

I attach our SCUM setting.

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan Call Dates called earlier than Call...
entry.content: Greetings, how often do you schedule the maintenance plan - do you run IP30 daily? It is possible that the cycle is reached before 45 days. Perhaps also think why do you use call horizon - would it be okay if the maintenance call object would be created when the cycle reaches 1000?

entry.title: Funds Management Accounting transaction is not considering Budget Amount at all
entry.content:
Hi All

I have configured Funds Management in S4Hana. When I post an accounting entry in F-02 in the system it is not picking up budget amount against the GL. No error or warning message is issued.

Accounting document as well as Controlling document are posted but no FM document is posted. 

I have verified my configuration and data derivation in FMDerive  as well.

Please let me know how to resolve the issue.

Rajeev Uppal

entry.title: Re: Setting up the COPAA Archieve Object
entry.content:
Hi,

OK, so you have to create the operating concern according your business rules. You can doit by copying an SAP operating concern template by customizing:

SPRO > Controlling > Profitability Analysis > Structures > Define Operating Concern > Sample Operating Concerns > 

then run the 2 sub-entries:

> Use SAP Operating Concern Template

> Copy Operating Concern including Customizing

Further information in below link:
Archiving of CO-PA Transaction Data | SAP Help Portal

Regards

Joseph

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan Call Dates called earlier than Call...
entry.content: Yes, IP30 is run daily via background job. We are using call horizon for MRP consideration. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Last Invoice Date in List of Customer Business Partners
entry.content:
Hi @kedalenechong ,

There are multiple ways to do this, a simple one would be assigning an FMS to an existing or custom field, triggering it from the field CardCode.

A VERY basic one:

SELECT
    MAX(RefDate)
FROM JDT1
WHERE 1 = 1
    AND ShortName = $[$5.0.0]
    AND TransType IN ('13', '14') -- Here you define which Objects are being looked into. In this case, the query is searching for AR Invoices and Credits, respectively.

Of course, the query above will bring the last document, which might be either an Invoice or a Credit. You may just adjust it to bring the document type you need, taking into consideration the differences between customers and suppliers. Also, it's not considering whether the document is cancelled or not, so, if you need to take it into account, it's a different story. This is just something to give you an idea on how this could be done and play around.

Apart from this, you could use a Stored Procedure to update data in a UDF or even use Add-Ons such as B1UP to do the job. Again, multiple ways.

I hope it helps,

Felipe

entry.title: Re: Architecting Complex Real-Time Business Solutions: SAP Build Process Automation with Auto Approv
entry.content: Thanks a lot @Murali_Shan for your kinds words. Here is the next blog of our series https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/architecting-complex-real-time-business-solutions-sap-bpa-with-dynamic/ba-p/13739684

entry.title: Re: Need to schedule a maintenance order on particularly...
entry.content: Greetings, If actual dates are not so important you can create a maintenance plan with cycle 15 days and setup start date as 6th of next month. The date will vary from month to month unfortunately. But if the date is required then I think you need to develop some additional functionalities with help of developers.

entry.title: Re: Architecting Complex Real-Time Business Solutions: SAP Build Process Automation with Auto Approv
entry.content: Thanks @Ravi_MDU good to hear about it. Please feel free in case needs any clarifications for the same.

entry.title: How do you name your global classes ?
entry.content:
Hi !

Maybe it's a dumb question... But I'm always wondered how others developers named their global classes, because our namespace (Z & Y) is pretty limited since everything created in the repository can be created once (for the same type). I would loved a solution where the namespace is linked to a package and so it will be possible to name 2 repository objects identically into 2 separate package, sweet dream.

Because of this, I often find my self using local classes in my programs, I find them more flexible and I can avoid to pollute unnecessarily the repository with odd names. But there are costs, one of them is reusability. Of course, I create global classe when it's make sense, like business object that I know there will be only one classe like ZCL_EQUIPEMENT or ZCL_DELIVERY (with some exceptions to the rule of course) or classes with clear boundaries.

But what about classes like MODEL / DAO / VIEW / CONTROLLER and so on ? If we are using MVC pattern in our development, we have to deal with this classes in multiples reports, so if global, name conflict may happen when for example 2 MODEL in different applications are created with slightly different interface but with the same semantic.

What are your recommandation about it ?

Thanks !

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 4 - Geospatial
entry.content: India to AIRBUS HQ .......................

entry.title: Automatic serial number determination during confirmation of production order in S/4HC ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

How automatic serial number can be generate during confirmation production order in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition . 

We having option serial number determination during creation and release of production order  but as in mentioned above we are looking at confirmation of production.

Thank  in advance . 
Harvind Narayan

entry.title: Outbound delivery assignment to TU in EWM / TM Integration.
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a basic question on TM / EWM integration in outbound process to end customer.

We do planning in TM and we get a TU in EWM, durring loading if user by accident select the TU which is not the actual one by mistake, is there any check in standard to restrict user to use only the TUs that are valid for that specific delivery?

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

 

First of all, I would like to thank and appreciate you for your post about the digital skills initiative.

This will help people to learn about SAP from scratch and push the boundaries of those who are part of the SAP Journey from different backgrounds of life especially for women who want to return to the work. I worked as Senior SAP Consultant and looking forward to learn more specifically SAP Integration and Finance and SAP BTP is a great resource to work on end to end integration across the systems.

Best Regards,

Harini DT.

entry.title: Re: Direct Link to SAP CRM Object BP_CONTACT
entry.content:
Hi Chris

Thank you for your reply.

I am not sending GUID but instead am sending CONP_NUMBER from UI. If user click on a contact ID i.e. CONP_NUMBER it should open the details with the account with which it has Main Relationship with. This works perfectly fine if contact id is linked to only one Account

but gives problem if contact id is linked to multiple account ids. I raised a ticket with SAP Product team as well -They told me that standard code is not equipped to handled two URL parameters Objects needs to be customized to accommodate this.

 

Thanks

Monika

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 4 - Geospatial
entry.content: Done with my week 4 submission .I experimented with Atlanta to France route.It was very good challenge SAP Hana Multi Model.Got learn many new Things.  @Vitaliy-R  Thanks.

entry.title: SAP CAP: different names for "EntityType" and "EntitySet"
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on consuming an existing on-premise OData service using CAP (Cloud Application Programming Model). The original service has an EntitySet called "AssetSet" with elements of type "Asset". The metadata looks something like this:

<EntitySet Name="AssetSet" EntityType="API.Asset"/>

I've imported the external service and defined in CAP as follows:

using { API } from './external/api';

extend service mirror_api {

  entity Asset as projection on API.Asset;

}

This produces metadata that looks like:

<EntitySet Name="Asset" EntityType="mirror_api.Asset"/>

My goal is to maintain the original EntitySet name ("AssetSet") instead of the current output ("Asset"). The metadata would look just like it is in the on-premise system, with an “EntitySet” named “AssetSet” and an “EntityType” named “API.Asset”. Is there a way to achieve this within CDS?

I've searched the documentation but haven't found a clear solution. I know that this was not supported back in 2019 (when someone else asked about it here).

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Best regards,

Rafael

entry.title: Excel customer contact / BP information from CRM to Excel
entry.content:
Can anyone advise on the best way to extract customer contact / BP information from CRM into Excel?

We are changing systems and need to extract the CRM information for migration via excel. How best to do this? What tables would I need to use to gain this information, is it via SE16?

Also, does anyone know the tables used to export contact information, e.g. notes / contact IDs / etc.

Thanks

entry.title: Is it possible to add another column/extension field to the open tasks view within my launchpad ?
entry.content:
Is it possible to add another column/extension field to the open tasks in work view of Home workcenter ? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add another column/extension field...
entry.content:
Hi

It is not possible to add extension fields via adaptation or personalization mode to Home work center in open tasks view.

entry.title: Message size limit in sap cloud integration
entry.content:
Hi,

There is always a debate between cloud integration vs ETL tool and when to use what especially when an org has both but managed by different teams.

One of the important factor is message size. However I have not come across any blog or piece of information that mentions the message size limit in cloud integration for each transaction. Can someone share the same?

Also if there are some points of considerations to make for CI vs ETL

@finny_babu @Sriprasadsbhat 

Best Regards

entry.title: P2P controlling analysis in Sap Process Insights
entry.content:
Hello Community.
Is it possible to analyze process flow related to Procure to Pay process with controlling data details (cost center, internal order, WBS). It seems that controlling data are not managed in details for PR,PO, invoice.

Thanks in advance.

Giuseppe

I oversee P&G and recently reviewed some Performance Plans where I noticed a status marked as "rejected."

I was wondering, as employees should not have the ability to reject a Performance Plan. Could you explain how the system could generate this action?

Regards

Firi

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Public Cloud: Product Compliance - Assign Com...
entry.content:
Hi Snigdhodeep,

Sorry for the confusion with the relationship between compliance purposes and compliance requirement. Here is one example on the help portal where it shows you need to activate a compliance requirement before assigning it to a compliance purpose. I think your issue highlights the need for us to have this point in the in-app help. Thank you for sharing this problem. Best wishes, Michael

entry.title: SAP Build WorkZone MyInbox App - Local copy
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to create a tile in Work Zone standard of My Inbox app with showAdditionalAttributes = true.

This requires me to create a local copy of My Inbox Html5 app.

Unfortunately, after that the Count at the tile stops working.

In the browser console I can see that there is Internal server error 500.

Do you have any ideas what could be the problem?

Thank you,

Patrik

entry.title: SAP BW/4HANA Data Model for SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting
entry.content:
Co-Authored: Andreas Tenholte and Philip Fengler

Introduction

We in the CoE EMEA Team for Data Warehousing & Data Management have developed a Group Reporting data model for SAP BW/4HANA. This model is now out of the pilot phase and is already being used successfully by several customers.

In the following, we would like to give you a brief overview of the model's target audience, its structure and functionality, as well as information on how to get access to the model if you are interested. So stay tuned, it's worth reading 😊

 

Target Group for the SAP BW/4HANA Group Reporting Model

A data model for SAP BW/4HANA has been requested by several customers who have one or more of the following requirements:

  • Use of SAP BW/4HANA as the central reporting platform for the execution of financial consolidation reporting.
  • The need to combine group reporting data with analytical data such as HCM KPIs, production data, etc.
  • Use the flexible analysis authorization framework to fine-tune row-level access based on hierarchy nodes such as consolidation unit and profit center.
  • The need to load and distribute group reporting data to other systems.

 

Interrelation between SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting and the BW Group Reporting Model

The provided SAP BW/4HANA data model is implemented based on the data structures used in SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting and leverages standard CDS views delivered as part of SAP S/4HANA, to extract and load the data into the receiving data model in SAP BW/4HANA. This data is then made available for reporting by applying group reporting logic including hierarchy elimination logic.

 

About the SAP BW/4HANA Group Reporting Model

The SAP BW/4HANA data model consists of Z*-objects (BW objects, ABAP CDS Views, HANA Calculation Views), covering transactional and master data. The model is aligned with SAP best practices, such as “Layered-Scalable-Architecture optimized for HANA” (LSA++) and HANA-optimized business content. The BW data model is currently not part of the official SAP BW/4 Business Content. This aspect requires further elaboration.

The following Group Reporting functionality is covered by the data model:

  • Version relations including extension versions
  • Group derivation logic based on the group structure
  • Hierarchy elimination
  • Period mode

The reports that can be created using the SAP BW/4HANA data model for Group Reporting provide the same functionality as the SAP S/4HANA embedded analytics reports of Group Data Analysis.

It is also possible to extend the functional scope of the Group Reporting data model to meet individual business requirements as part of the service delivery (see below):

  • Downporting the SAP BW/4HANA data model to SAP BW on HANA 7.50
  • Reporting rules to cover Cash Flow reporting, that corresponds to Group Data Analysis including Reporting Rules in SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics
  • Handling of physical deletions

 

How to get access to the SAP BW/4HANA Group Reporting Model?

The service delivery is carried out by the CoE EMEA Team for Data Warehousing and Data Management as part of the Premium Engagement. 

Below is an overview of the service delivery plan and the added value of the collaboration as part of the Premium Engagement.

Service Plan Proposal

  • Enablement Workshop for Data and Analytics is the service to get to understand the SAP BW/4HANA pilot data model and, based on customer-specific business demands, identify potential gaps resulting in a high-level design and project plan for the proof-of-concept phase (Jump Start Service).
  • Jump-start for Analytics and Data Management to deploy the pilot data model for SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting in customers SAP BW/4HANA sandbox system with the adjustments as scoped, testing, final sign-off including hand-over to the project team.
  • Safeguarding Services, on Performance Optimization (BPPO, TPO), Quality Assurance Assessments (FTC, TIC), Going Live Support, etc. complete the service plan proposal.

Value

  • Speed up Time-to-Value: Fast deployment of a proven pilot data model for SAP S/4HANA Group Reporting with SAP BW/4HANA.
  • Know-how-transfer how the data model works including key design considerations.
  • Utilize the know-how of SAP experts to reduce the TCO of the application model for Group Reporting in SAP BW/4HANA e.g., by understanding Data Tiering Optimization options.
  • Option to extend and enrich the model based on customers specific requirements for Group Reporting by the input and help of SAP experts.

If you are interested in getting in touch with us, you will find the necessary contacts in our Focus Package.

entry.title: Re: OMR4 - How change document type in MIRO

entry.title: Re: Change in Reference number - After RERAPP
entry.content:
Thanks its correct. 

BADI_RERA_DOC

Technical field EXTREFERENCENO

entry.title: Re: Error in Scrap Sales Order
entry.content: The error message is self-explanatory.  You need to extend the material to the required Sales Area without which, you cannot create sale order for that material.

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hi!

I work as an Engineering Planner with 10 years of practical use of SAP, but just 2 years of using ECC EAMS, MM and FICO modules.
I work in Transportation onshore industry, and with frequent changes in our system, i came here mostly to learn, and adapt my skills and knowledge and enhance them to a next level.
Btw, i am Robert!

entry.title: Re: Remove yellow drill down arrows in query
entry.content:
Hi

you can try it like that

with DocData AS
(
SELECT
'Klantorder' AS 'Document',
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode],
T0.[CardName],
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[TreeType]

FROM
ORDR T0
INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]

WHERE
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T1.[Dscription] Like '%%[%1]%%' AND
T1.[TreeType] <> 'I' AND
T0.[CANCELED] = 'N'

UNION ALL

SELECT
'Uitgaande factuur en betaling' AS 'Document',
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode],
T0.[CardName],
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[TreeType]

FROM
OINV T0
INNER JOIN INV1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]

WHERE
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T1.[Dscription] Like '%%[%1]%%' AND
T1.[TreeType] <> 'I' AND
T0.[CANCELED] = 'N' AND
T0.[IsICT] = 'Y'
)
SELECT * FROm DocData

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello!

i am Robert and i am from Rijeka, Croatia, where i was born, raised, live and work at.

entry.title: Re: Rename Printer's Output Device
entry.content: device type and shortname must be different , it works

entry.title: Re: Remove yellow drill down arrows in query
entry.content:
Thanks for your reaction. Is this also a way to do it:

CAST (T0.[DocNum] as nvarchar) as 'Documentnummer'

Is this ok?

entry.title: Re: QUICK CATCHUPS ON TOP-20-SWPM/SUM ERRORS – SAP INSTALLATION ON AIX – ORACLE #ATR
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

    I have updated now. Thanks for highlighting !

entry.title: Re: What are the different components of the NetWeaver ke...
entry.content: The SAP kernel has only "two numbers": release and patch level.

entry.title: Re: Signavio Integration with APQC
entry.content:
Hi Ghemraj,

The SAP Signavio Process Manager has an import option which will allow you to recreate the APQC Process Classification Framework as a series of interconnected L1, L2, L3 value chains and BPMN models.

More details are available here - https://help.sap.com/docs/signavio-process-manager/user-guide/import-apqc-framework?locale=en-US

If you dont see the option "Import APQC Excel" in your Process Manager module, please raise a ticket in SAP for me and the Signavio support team can enable the import for your workspace.

Regards,
Projit

entry.title: Re: F110 Aggregation of open items after editing proposal
entry.content: Now, try to remove the Grouping Key in the Vendor Master. The grouping key is used in cases where you do not want all the open items of a customer or a vendor to be paid together but rather you want only those items which belong together to be grouped into a single payment. A maximum of three fields from the open items are defined for every grouping key; the contents of these fields must correspond in order that the open items can be paid together.

entry.title: Re: Call custom screen and popup in SAP Radio Frequency(R...
entry.content:
Hello,
to be used by RF framework, any screen have to have a generated corresponding HTML page by using proposed template. It's done for custom screen ?
And screen have to be defined in customizing of mobile data entry (ie view V_T3130C Screen management, and view V_T3130E Logical screen), but I guess it's ok for this point ?

Else, what is run time error generated ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi, im from canada, now living in usa

entry.title: SAC Table - 3 Dimension Rows are merged to 1 Row automatically without hierarchy?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am experiencing a weird behavior in my Table. All Dimensions that I select on Rows will be merged in 1 Row with a hierarchy (>). But every Dimension has Hierarchy=Flat Presentation. How is this possible? I never seen such a behavior?

entry.title: How can we setup number ranges for Sales and Billing documents in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
We want to set up number ranges for sales document and the billing documents , how can we do this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT throwing 'Provide Line-IDs' error during a POST call with Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hi Community ,

I have created a custom field with Business Context as 'Material Document Item' in Custom Fields App in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud . I have enabled it for ODATA Service API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV and at GUI level it is disabled.

When i do a GET call at Header Level (Extending to Line Item) using API Material Documents - Read, Create ; it successfully gives me the Material Document details with header and line items(along with the created custom fields). But when i do a POST call for posting a material document by putting custom fields in to the Payload, i get an error message saying 'Provide line ID's when using Business Context MATERIALDOCUMENTITEM'.

POST call works fine if i remove the custom field.

Attached screenshots of Successful GET Call with Custom fields, payload Used for POST call and Error message during POST call.

Please suggest me a solution to resolve above mentioned issue.

entry.title: Re: How can we setup number ranges for Sales and Billing...
entry.content:
Please refer to :

  • Flexible Sales Document Numbering
  • Flexible Billing Document Numbering

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: That's great @Robert_22 - great to have you here in SAP Community! I'm sure you will learn plenty here!

entry.title: ABAP RAP UI - Hide the standard navigation to a list item
entry.content:
Hello,

Right now I am developing a RAP application with a standard UI (without UI5) and came across an interesting case with navigation.

As you can see in the image down below when we link to some entity view then we get a list of its items.

annotate view ZMAIN_VIEW with
{
@UI.facet:[
...
{id:'LinkedEntity',
purpose:#STANDARD,
type:#LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
label:'LinkedEntity',
position:10,
targetElement:'_LinkedEntity'}
]
....
}

 

My question is - can we somehowe hide the standard navigation to a list item without using UI5 and by saving the CUD funcionality?

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Creating a story with Dymanic Version & Date Combinations
entry.content:
Thanks pedrosan .

I agree that when providing solutions, maintainability is key and simple solutions work better in longterm. 

But using restricted measures and input controls has their set of issues to deal with when working with cross calculations across rows and columns. Sometimes they give incorrect results. We have already tried the solution with restricted measures but ended up creating more input controls for each combination of Version and Time. 

I am trying to give another option to people to choose out of all the possible solutions. 

Thanks 

Visu

entry.title: when performing a Status change in solman 7.2 the error "XSRF token not found" occurs
entry.content: We updated the support package for the solman environment to level 18, after the update in some calls when executing a Status change (e.g. 40 quality to 60 awaiting approval) in solman 7.2 the error "XSRF Token not found" occurs (note 1795897).

entry.title: Re: CPI with PostgreSQL
entry.content:
Oh no... Bobby's mother did it again! 🤣

 

{
  "employee_details": [
    {
      "employee_id": "1",
      "employee_name": "Robert'); DROP TABLE EMPLOYEE; --"
    }
  ]
}

 

The script needs some railguards as it is subject to SQL injection. 

One alternative is to use the XML SQL format (and using the MarkupBuilder to avoid XML injection)
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/payload-and-operation

Go to SE37 T-code, Enter your FM name and look at the highlighted portion of the image below..

Below image shows the Description of Function group.

Regards,

Awais Syed

BR, 

Michal

entry.title: Re: B1 Service Layer - Uploading Attachments - Empty file

Any help please?

Thank you

entry.title: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Hello Experts

Can anyone tell me please how to solve this?

when i execute assessment cycle from KSU5 to allocate the cost from cost object to another in S4hana,

a CO document gets created and also an FI document gets created due to real time reconciliation of CO and FI.

my question is I want to substitute the assessment cost element in FI document with other GL accounts based on the sender and the receiver CO object, how can I achieve that in S4hana.

I created a substation rule under FI line items, and it didn't work, I also created one under CO line, but it didn't work.  

kindly assist

entry.title: Approve a document via Service Layer - SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I need to approve a document via Service Layer.
The API call below allows me to approve a document using the user currently logged-in (the user of the current Service Layer session).

PATCH https://myhost:50000/b1s/v1/ApprovalRequests(1)

{
"ApprovalRequestDecisions": [
{
"Status": "ardApproved",
"Remarks": "Approved - OK"
}
]
}

How can I approve a document assigned to another user please?
Where can I find documentation for the ApprovalRequestDecisions API call please?

I'm using FP2202 HF1.

Thank you,
Best Regards,
Claudio

entry.title: How do I extract data from SAP R/3 (4.7) ?
entry.content:
Hi,

As we are trying to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public) through staging tables, could you please suggest possible ways to extract data from version 4.7? We need to extract all fields and tables (both specified and unspecified/classified and non-classified) from R/3.

We have attempted to extract data using transaction code SE16N, but we couldn't extract all tables, especially the classified ones. By using transaction code RSO2 for custom data source creation, we managed to extract some data, but not all fields from the tables. Kindly suggest possible ways to achieve complete data extraction, including any other transaction codes that may be useful.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
You can use a formatted search in the Field "Item Code" with the query with a parameter but without Auto refresh:

Select T0.ItemCode from OITM T0 where T0.U_A_CatNo = '[%0]'

entry.title: Re: Route schedule delivery date skips first available PGI date
entry.content: Has anyone encountered such an issue?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hi @David_Chaviano ，

Very excited to get a chance to participate in the digital initiative program, and already finished one learning path in our learning hub.

Being a new comer in SAP area, I bumped into difficuties such as not being regarded as a professional tech guy as a young women, so i hope the intiative can give me a chance to acquire an official certification to prove my competence and get acknowleged by more clients.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Count number of direct reports through business rules
entry.content: I appreciate the information. However, I need to make it into a rule so when a Manager has a change in number of direct reports we have a field populated. I know we can report on it. I want to use it in the business rules. I also cannot find the field.

entry.title: How to create a handling unit in hu02 with external identification type H?
entry.content:
Hi

The external identification type H (SSCC from vendor) allows me to input any SSCC code regardless of if it matches any of my plants, this is useful for registering HUs from vendors where I can reuse their SSCC codes and labels.

The issue is that I can only seem to create these HUs in VL31N - inbound delivery, when packing my materials. I cannot figure out how to make this type of HU in transaction HU02 - it wants me to follow the SSCC ranges and ILN numbers from customizing, despite it being an SSCC code created not by me but from a vendor.

Any way to create a HU with vendor SSCC in HU02?

entry.title: Re: Error "User not allowed as a requestor" in Create Req...
entry.content: Found the solution, I had not created an employee and then linked the SAP user and employee, then given the employee the rights to purchase.

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Portal BW reports after Netweaver EOL
entry.content:
Hi,

You can create URL Tile in the Fiori Launchpad and open the Report in the browser tab.

Regards,

Rohit Gera

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP UI - Hide the standard navigation to a list item
entry.content: it is v2 or v4?

entry.title: Re: Password change by BAPI_USER_CHANGE
entry.content: I don't want to click each link and display the images elsewhere, so please embed the screenshot(s) as below

entry.title: Re: ABAP_trial 2022 HDB start problems: log full still ac...
entry.content:
Hi Wolfgang,

I talked to a colleague.

He suggested that you "may have performed a large number of DB transactions, and that the Log Disk actually full.

How big is the Log Disk?
Have you tried ALTER SYSTEM RECLAIM LOG on HANA Console?"

I'll be honest; this is not my specialism. Have you tried this?
Best wishes,

Julie.

entry.title: Re: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
To make the yellow arrows work, please place the following comment as the first line in the query
/* SELECT T8.DocEntry FROM OPCH T8 */

If you want to link a base document with a target document, you must always use the following three fields: BaseEntry, BaseLine and BaseType. Please do not link by ItemCode, but by BaseType:

-------------
/* SELECT T8.DocEntry FROM OPCH T8 */
SELECT

T8.DocEntry, T8.DocNum,
T2.DocNum,
T7a.[U_AF_MAJORGRP], T7a.[U_AF_OVERGRP],
T7b.ItmsGrpNam,
T7.ItemCode, T7.Dscription,
T7.Quantity, T7a.InvntryUom, T8.DocDate, T8.DocDueDate,
T8.CardCode, T8.CardName, T7.Price


FROM POR1 T1
LEFT JOIN OPOR T2 ON T1.DocEntry = T2.DocEntry
LEFT JOIN PDN1 T3 ON T2.DocEntry = T3.BaseEntry AND T1.LineNum = T3.BaseLine AND T3.BaseType = 22
LEFT JOIN OPDN T4 ON T3.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry
LEFT JOIN RPD1 T5 ON T4.DocEntry = T5.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T5.BaseLine AND T5.BaseType = 20
LEFT JOIN ORPD T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
LEFT JOIN PCH1 T7 ON T4.DocEntry = T7.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T7.BaseLine AND T7.BaseType = 20
LEFT JOIN OPCH T8 ON T7.DocEntry = T8.DocEntry
LEFT JOIN OITM T7a ON T7.[ItemCode] = T7a.[ItemCode]
INNER JOIN OITB T7b ON T7a.[ItmsGrpCod] = T7b.[ItmsGrpCod]
LEFT JOIN RPC1 T9 ON T8.DocEntry = T9.BaseEntry AND T7.LineNum = T9.BaseLine AND T9.BaseType = 18
LEFT JOIN ORPC T10 ON T9.DocEntry = T10.DocEntry

WHERE
T8.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T8.[DocDate] <=[%1]
ORDER BY T8.DocNum

entry.title: Re: SRM user has no Central Person or Position, how to ge...
entry.content: The solution was to run transaction USERS_GEN to manually get the system to sync the user between ECC and SRM.

entry.title: Block batch before arrives
entry.content:
I have a part number that I will receive a specific batch that I have to block at the company's entrance.

It is a schedule agreement not a closed order. Do you know how I can block a specific batch before it arrives?

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP UI - Hide the standard navigation to a list...
entry.content:
Hello @junwu 
V4

entry.title: Re: How to use fuzzy search in cds query
entry.content: I have tried using the 'or' operator in local hana db, it works there. But when I try to query external API , only 'and' operator works there.

entry.title: Re: How to use fuzzy search in cds query
entry.content: I have also tried using the following syntax but got the same result with it as well: let where= [{func : 'contains', args : [{ref : ['ID']},{val : req.query.SELECT.search[0].val }]} , 'or' , {func : 'contains', args : [{ref : ['name']},{val : req.query.SELECT.search[0].val }]} ] req.query.SELECT.where = where

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: Onboarding Rule Configurations in Data Review Scenarios
entry.content:
Hi @piyushkumarag @smitajalit ,

After 1H 2024 release 'Basic' rule types are deprecated right. So we cannot create any new business rule of 'Basic' type.

I see your example business rules are of Basic type.
Can you suggest how to configure this now?

Thanks,

Harish

entry.title: Re: Need Guidance to develop app at S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Please refer to the documents linked in my blog post: SAP S/4HANA Extensibility: All You Need to Know - SAP Community

Best regards,

Thomas

.

entry.title: Re: Sap Build Qr Code Generator
entry.content:
Just a quick look at your first image (where you have the script that actually prepares the qr code) you seem to lack the .makeCode() method. 

So what you have written is this part: 

```
const qrcode = new QRCode("test", {
text: "https://google.com",
width: 128,
height: 128,
colorDark : "#000000",
colorLight : "#ffffff",
correctLevel : QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
});
```

But this just creates the object of the qr code, that will not yet actually generate the qr code. At least as per the docs based on a quick google search here: qr code js by davidschimjs 
So my suggestion that instead of the 
```
return qrcode;
```
write: 
```
return qrcode.makeCode();
```

I have not tried it yet, but as far as I can see in the codepen on the docs it returns a base64 string. So make sure to handle that in your code or the logic canvas accordingly. 
Suggestions: 
1. Turn the base64 code into a blob and return the blob url in js. 
2. Return the base64 string and use a 'write file' flow function where you actually store that as a local file and can use it in the image preview. Or you can also upload it to storage if that's something that you would need to do. 

Let me know if this helps.

PS, I like the way how you utilise the 'globalThis', I was not aware of that prior to your post. Does the globalThis work on the native version of the apps (preview and build) or only on the web runtime?

entry.title: Re: In F110, the system select invoice for vendor that do...
entry.content: No it does noot

entry.title: Re: In Migrate your data app error as "The tax number for tax number category IN3 is already ma
entry.content: Reached out to community mods, as this post has two other duplicate threads on out platform hence this one can be removed.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori List Report Utilizing CDS View with Parameters
entry.content:
Hi,

thanks for the guide - but what about navigating from list report page with parameter to an object page with a parameter. How can I pass the parameter from the list report to the object page? - can this be done in a composition - to parent association constellation?

BRG

entry.title: Downpayment and MIRO in SAP4/hana
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

I have a doubt and I hope you can help me:

The scenario is as follows:

My user has registered a passive invoice for 36600 euros (including 6000 euros VAT).

The subject of the purchase order is an asset (but for simplicity's sake we can assume it is consumable material).

The supplier issues an invoice for an advance payment of 10% (3660 Euros including VAT), the Accounting department records the payment with F-48 (indicating the PO number) and records the passive invoice for the advance payment.

After this if I look at the PO I notice that there is the entry "advance" for the sum of 3660, when the goods arrive I enter the goods and try to record the invoice.

At the time of MIRO the system with a popup tells me that "Down payment on current assets exist" but I have no way to attribute them to the invoice.

The end result desired by the users should be:

Invoice recorded with MIRO amounting to 36600-3660= 32940 euro to get alligned with what comes from the supplier.

I have read that if I do not find the DP field on the MIRO I have to activate the BP "LOG_MMFI_P2P" but before making such a change I would like to be sure.

We are in S/4hana

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG-M Error - Entity MATCHGMNG does not exist - W...
entry.content: I was facing the same issue. It was due to a shared object which buffers some metadata (in my case the it was area CL_MDG_BS_MAT_TOOLS_AREA). The resolution from Note 3059053 - [MDG-M] Error: mapping definition does not exist for entity MARCPRT helped.

entry.title: Delivery indicator is not activated of not having stock entered in inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

Scenario :-

Intercompany process:- A company code  transferred goods to B company code did all the process eg :-delivery note , Goods issue and when it is received in Company B ..following documents created Inbound delivery done but with 0 quantities in last year where delivery indicator is not triggered when GR is done .

 

However the issue is how do we tackle to delete that lineitem or trigger that delivery note what will be the solution ...?

note :- sometimes the delivery indicator is not even triggered for some linitems of last yeat what could be done for those PO.

entry.title: RAP FIORI ELEMENTS: Disable modal popup for create and add inline row
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,
I'm working with SAP RAP FIORI V4 and have encountered an issue: when clicking on the 'Create' button in the table, a modal window opens for data entry.
I would like to change this behavior so that clicking 'Create' adds a new empty row directly in the table for inline editing.

I'm using the standard UI without UI5.

How can I configure this behavior for the 'Create' button?
Any advice or implementation examples would be greatly appreciated.

Kind regards

entry.title: How to pass parameter from parameterized parent view to parameterized child view?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have two CDS-Views with the same Parameters. They have a composition - to parent association constellation.

The parent view will be used to build a Fiori List Report Page (via Elements). The composition view will provide data for the object page.

Problem:

I can't figure out how to pass the parameter from parent view to child view.

Can this be done on the CDS-View level?

See CDS-Views attached.

CDS-View1:

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS1'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: false
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@OData.publish: true
define root view entity C_VIEW1_Parameterized
  with parameters
    @Consumption.derivation: { lookupEntity: 'C_SglGregorianCalDateFunction',
      resultElement: 'DateFunctionStartDate', binding: [ {
        targetParameter: 'P_DateFunction', type: #PARAMETER, value : 'P_DateFunction' },
         { targetParameter : 'P_Language' , type : #SYSTEM_FIELD, value : '#SYSTEM_LANGUAGE'  } ]
      }
    @Consumption.hidden: true
    P_StartDate    : bedat,

    @Consumption.derivation: { lookupEntity: 'C_SglGregorianCalDateFunction',
    resultElement: 'DateFunctionEndDate', binding: [ {
      targetParameter: 'P_DateFunction', type: #PARAMETER, value : 'P_DateFunction' },
       { targetParameter : 'P_Language' , type : #SYSTEM_FIELD, value : '#SYSTEM_LANGUAGE'  } ]
    }
    @Consumption.hidden: true
    P_EndDate      : bedat,
    @Consumption.defaultValue: 'PREVIOUSYEARTODATE'
    @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
      entity: {
        name:'C_GregorianCalDateFuncVH',
        element:'DateFunction'
      }
    }]
    p_datefunction : datefunctionid
  as select from I_VIEW_PARAMETERIZED( P_StartDate: $parameters.P_StartDate , P_EndDate: $parameters.P_EndDate)
  composition of C_VIEW2_Parameterized as _cview2
{
  key variable1,
      variable2,
      variable3,
      _cview2  

}

 

CDS-View2:

 

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Test2'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@OData.publish: true
define view entity CVIEW2_PARAMETERIZED
  with parameters
    P_StartDate    : bedat,
    P_EndDate      : bedat
    p_datefunction : datefunctionid
  as select from I_View2_PARAMETERIZED ( P_StartDate: $parameters.P_StartDate, P_EndDate: $parameters.P_EndDate)
  association to parent C_VIEW1 as _cview1 on $projection.variable1 = _cview1.variable1

{

  key variable1,
  key variable2,
_cview1($parameters.P_EndDate, p_datefunction: $parameters.P_datefunction ).variable3,

      _cview1

}

 

BRG Schoko

entry.title: Re: How to avoid to fall goods to COGI during collective confirmation (IW42) goods posting ?
entry.content: Greetings Peter, I have customized this in OIOR but my goods movements sill fall in COGI. Documentation states: "The indicator is only evaluated if either no process control key or one process control key has been stored that enbles the goods movements to be posted in dialog AND for which the "provide error handling for goods movements" indicator is active." --> I am unable to find this setting.

entry.title: Re: how to transport an ambient ui5 application
entry.content: Thanks again Noel. Is there anything "special" I should include when shipping from DEV to QAS ? Because I redid the passage of the application and odata services and it still doesn't work (I have the services active).

entry.title: Q - the easy Installer for SAP IQ - ng 2024
entry.content:
last changed: 27th of June 2024

Q - the easy Installer for SAP IQ - ng 2024

Blog Content

as the rudimental HTML anker functionality is not available anymore in the current SAP Blog capabilities, I had to deactivate the TOC.

    • enable HTTPS Port 1129 for the SAP Host Agent
    • the Answer: Q – the easy Installer for SAP IQ
    • create DSN (.odbc.ini) with iqdsn
    • prepare the SSL/TLS IQ Setup
    • the new DBACOCKPIT for IQ
    • the SAP BW(/4) nearline storage configuration
    • the SAP S/4 ILM Store configuration

Beginning with 2017, the request for the Installation of SAP (Sybase) IQ grow for several reasons, everyone can understand also followed by the message - SAP Commitment to On-Premise SAP IQ Customers (May 2020)

    • from nearline storage to cold store - SAP & PBS - SAP HANA  Data Lake -
    • private vs. public DataLake - SAP (Sybase) IQ – the hidden treasure …
    • reducing the memory food print on SAP HANA - btellegent - DataVard Glue - clariba -
    • better TCO for in-memory applications - GrayMatter
    • simplified data management - IT Central Station 
    • System Properties Comparison SAP HANA vs. SAP IQ - DB Engines
    • who owns your own data - why SAP BW/4HANA?
    • SAP ILM with IQ - reducing memory footprint in S/4


Besides that, other bullet points came into the consideration:

    • structured access to unstructured content in Data Lake - SAP (Sybase) IQ – the hidden treasure …
    • streaming capabilities - Ignite vs. SAP IQ - ATTUNITY - AecorSoft -
    • performance alternative to existing Data Lake implementation - clariba - webobjects - askdata


Since 2013, the SAP First Guidance - SAP NLS Solution with SAP IQ 16.x became the "Almanack" and Blue Print for SAP IQ Database Implementations, despite for SAP or native usage.



Overview - SAP NLS Solution for BW(4) - Overview 2021

These SAP KBA Notes where created with the user roland.kramer@sap.com
Note 2780668 - SAP First Guidance - BW NLS Implementation with SAP IQ
Note 3017355 - SAP IQ 16.1 SP04 PLx - correct SAPIQDB.cfg settings
Note 3094594 - Enable SAP IQ for DBACOCKPIT
Note 3085053 - Landscape Considerations for NLS and ILM
Note 3119008 - Configure SAP IQ and HANA for SDA/ODBC
Note 3196447 - troubleshooting an existing SAP IQ 16.x Implementation for NLS/DTO and ILM

Imagine now, there is a simple routine based on the SAPHostAgent to install SAP (Sybase) IQ 16.x with three input values to create any kind of SAP IQ database instantly:

    • <SID> (What, also IQ gets a SAP <SID>?)
    • Instance Number (what's about port 2638?)
    • Size of DB in GB (including all sizing considerations)

even more, to solve all mysteries around the usage there is the following source available:

Blog - demystifying NLS/ILM error messages …


enable HTTPS Port 1129 for the SAP Host Agent

either you call the SAPHostAgent via HTTP Port 1128 or HTTPS Port 1129
SAP Help - Configuring SSL for SAP Host Agent on UNIX

or run the following command (same setup as for the SL Container Bridge)
check that NO secondary sapadm user is logged on to the server via ADS!

 

server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./saphostexec -install
# optional TLS 1.2 since PL57 for 7.22
server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./saphostexec -setup tls12
# check the correct settings for /tmp
server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # mount | grep "/tmp"
/dev/mapper/vg_sys_r1-tmp on /tmp type ext4 (rw,nodev,noexec,noatime,data=ordered)
server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe #
# check the correct execution of the SAPHostAgent webmethods (*.conf)
server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # saphostctrl -host <hostname> -function ExecuteOperation -name versioninfo
Webmethod returned successfully
Operation ID: 5CF3FCDCB65C1EDD9281CCF3DEC085A5
Info: Retrieve version info: Linux
Info: saphostcontrol: exitcode=0
Info: saphostcontrol: 'Retrieve version info' successfully executed
server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe #

 

add/check the following parameter to the file host_profile and restart the SAPHostAgent

 

server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # vi host_profile
service/admin_users = sapadm <sid>adm
service/disable_capability = ExecuteOperation/PermissionPolicy
saphostagent/ssl_setup = true
ssl/server_pse = /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/sec/SAPSSLS.pse
server:/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe # ./saphostexec -restart

 

now it is possible to call the SAPHostAgent on HTTPS Port 1129

 

#create the url on host via:
echo https://$(hostname -f):1129/NLSSetup/prepare

 

If you still have trouble with the execution see the  - SAP Host Agent Troubleshooting Guide

the Answer: Q - the easy Installer for SAP IQ

Q introduces to James ...

the following picture shows the Setup of - Q - which is actually the same Installation Procedure as the SAP Datahub SL Container Bridge Architecture ...

Q - overall process of functionality

Version v0.75(s) uses "standard" values for IQ Block and Page Size
(you can further optimize the Block and Page size for the ILM and NLS use case. (s) stands for SSL/TLS setup of the SAP IQ database)

Q - enter the three values

SAP IQ Hardware Sizing Guide – The Complete Memory Picture

Please Note: IQ 16.1 SP05 PL12 (the latest Version in 2024)
for SAP NLS and ILM scenarios, also update the IQ Network Client to the latest Version.

Note 3233538 - SAP IQ 16.1 SP04 PL14 (Build 17091) Release Notes Information
Note 3233571 - SAP IQNC 16.1 SP04 PL14 (Build 17091) Release Notes Information

Note 3315581 - SAP IQ 16.1 SP05 PL08 (Build 12790) Release Notes Information
Note 3315550 - SAP IQNC 16.1 SP05 PL08 (Build 12790) Release Notes Information

In case the /tmp Directory is mounted as read-only then follow the steps in the Note
Note 2104632 - ./setup.bin raises warning /tmp does not have enough disk space! - SAP IQ
Note 3218186 – Error: Create new (IQ) database from utility database fails

 

 

# in case for a manual IQ binary Installation or upgrade
server:/ebf29137 # export IATEMPDIR=/sapmnt/tmp
server:/ebf29137 # export DISPLAY= 10.123.456.789:0.0
server:/ebf29137 # ./setup.bin
Preparing to install
Extracting the JRE from the installer archive...
Unpacking the JRE...
Extracting the installation resources from the installer archive...
Configuring the installer for this system's environment...
Launching installer...

 



The SAPHostAgent uses a routine called "sapinstancebuilder" which creates a complete file system structure equally to an existing SAP Systems like SAP HANA or SAP BW/ERP/etc.


the SAP Instance Builder function in the SAP Host Agent

 


You can always watch the progress of the IQ Installation in the URL of the Browser
http://server.domain.ext:1128/NLSSetup/prepare
https://server.domain.ext:1129/NLSSetup/execute

 

 

/usr/sap/watch -d du -sh <SID>/*
/sapmnt/watch -d du -sh <SID>/*

 


or alternatively in the SAPHostAgent working directory

 

/usr/sap/hostctrl/work # tail -f nls.execution.status

 

Details of the Q Logfile

 

create DSN (.odbc.ini) with iqdsn

Once the IQ Database Installation is finished, you can use the I-SQL Windows Client to connect to the Database and Check the status with the sp procedures.

connect to the SAP IQ database with the I-SQL Client

 


SAP IQ allows you with the sql tool iqdsn to create a DSN entry directly in the file .odbc.ini located in the home directory of the SAP IQ Administrator.
Note 2285881 - How to Enable ODBC Connection Tracing in SAP IQ

 

sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db> iqdsn -y -w iq_utility -c "UID=DBA;PWD=Sybase4me;
ServerName=iq_utility;DatabaseName=utility_db;HOST=${HOSTNAME}:34238"
sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db>
iqdsn -y -w hostname_SQ1_11 -c "UID=DBA;PWD=Sybase4me;DatabaseName=SAPIQDB;
ServerName=hostname_SQ1_11;HOST=${HOSTNAME}:$SIQ_SERVERPORT"
Configuration "hostname_SQ1_11" written to file /usr/sap/SQ1/home/.odbc.ini
sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db> dbping -d -c dsn=hostname_SQ1_11
Connected to SQL Anywhere 16.1.50.1949 server
Ping database successful.
sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db> iqdsn -l -b
SAP IQ Data Source Utility Version 16.1.50.1949
SAP IQ User Data Sources:
iq_utility
hostname_SQ1_11
sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db>

 

essential sp procedures to check the SAP IQ database

 

# essential sp procedures for SAP IQ
sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db>
dbisql -c "uid=SAPSQ1USR;pwd=Sybase4me;DSN=hostname_SQ1_11;logfile=connect_SQ1.txt" -nogui
(SAPSQ1USR>)
sp_iqlmconfig;
sp_iqstatus;
sp_iqcheckoptions;
sp_displayroles;
sp_iqdbspace;
sp_iqdbspaceobjectinfo USER0001;

 

optional SAP IQ database validation procedure

 

sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db> dbvalid -c "uid=DBA;pwd=Sybase4me;DSN=hostname_SQ1_11"
SQL Anywhere Validation Utility Version 17.0.9.4899
WARNING: database being validated was not started read-only
VALIDATE DATABASE
VALIDATE TABLE "SYS"."DUMMY"
...

VALIDATE TABLE "rs_systabgroup"."rs_lastcommit"
VALIDATE TABLE "rs_systabgroup"."rs_threads"
No errors reported
sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db>

 



If for any reason it is not possible to connect to the IQ Database with the Windows Client, you can also directly call the Interface with the tool dbisql (also with the usage of the DSN above)

Blog - Increasing the SAP-NLS Performance

 

prepare the SSL/TLS IQ Setup


if you want to enable an encrypted SAP IQ Database with SSL/TLS support, it is suitable to include the following software components to the SAP IQ installation environment:

    • SAP Host Agent 7.22
    • SapMachine 11 or higher
    • openssl V3.x


if you want to install a newer version of openssl to the existing OS Version do as follows:

### Unix / Linux / macOS - download from https://www.openssl.org/source/

/opt/openssl/> tar -xvf openssl-3.0.4.tar.gz
/opt/openssl/openssl-3.0.4> ./Configure
/opt/openssl/openssl-3.0.4> make
/opt/openssl/openssl-3.0.4> make install
/opt/openssl/openssl-3.0.4> ldconfig -v
/opt/openssl/openssl-3.0.4> openssl version -v
OpenSSL 3.0.4 21 Jun 2022 (Library: OpenSSL 3.0.4 21 Jun 2022)


prepare the SSL scenario

Note 3093731 - How to set up TLS (Transport Layer Security) in SAP IQ16.X -- SAP IQ
Note 2117279 - SAP IQ: How to generate CSR for third party trusted CA (VeriSign)

Q - the easy SAP IQ Database Installer is creating this now automatically.

sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db>

createcert -x -ca 1 -co rsaroot.crt -ko rsaroot.key -kp changeit -io dummy -scn "IQ Certification Authority" -so "IQ, Inc." -sou "IQ Signing Department" -sl "Walldorf" -sst "ON" -sc "CA" -3des -v 10 -u 6,7 -b 2048 -m "101"

createcert -ca 0 -co dummy1 -ko dummy2 -kp changeit -io rsaroot.id -c rsaroot.crt -ck rsaroot.key -cp changeit -scn "hostname.fqdn" -so "IQ Inc." -sou "IQ Accounts" -sl "Walldorf" -sst "ON" -sc "CA" -3des -v 10 -u 1,3 -b 2048 -m "102"

sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db> dir
-rwxrwxr-x 1 sq1adm sapsys    1436 Jul 26 13:47 rsaroot.crt
-rwxrwxr-x 1 sq1adm sapsys    4729 Jul 26 13:47 rsaroot.id
-rwxrwxr-x 1 sq1adm sapsys    1874 Jul 26 13:47 rsaroot.key
sq1adm@hostname:/usr/sap/SQ1/data/db>

or use the Tutorial - Set Up Transport Layer Security (TLS) in SAP IQ

SSL logon with I-SQL to IQ

SSL encrypted remote source IQ - HANA

 

connect to a SSL/TLS encrypted SAP IQ Database via dbisql has to be enhanced:

dbisql -c "uid=DBA;pwd=Sybase4me;eng=hostname_<SID_<nr>;LINKS=TCPIP;ENC=TLS(FIPS=Y;TLS_TYPE=RSA;trusted_certificate=hostname_<SID>_<nr>.crt;skip_certificate_name_check=on)" -nogui

the SAP IQ Remote Source had to be enhanced as well (Extra Adapter Properties):

EngineName=hostname_<SID>_<nr>;DatabaseName=SAPIQDB;CommLinks=tcpip(host=hostname.fqdn;port=3<nr>38);LINKS=TCPIP;ENC=TLS(FIPS=Y;TLS_TYPE=RSA;trusted_certificates=/usr/sap/B4H/SYS/global/hostnam_<SID>_<nr>.crt;skip_certificate_name_check=on)

the DBCO String is also enhanced for the SSL/TLS usage:

SYBASE_SERVER=hostname.fqdn SYBASE_PORT=3<nr>38 SYBASE_IQ_ENGINE=hostname_<SID>_<nr>
SYBASE_DBNAME=SAPIQDB SYBASE_SSL=1 skip_certificate_name_check=yes
SYBASE_IQ_LOAD_DIR=/sapmnt/IQ SYBASE_CONTYPE=IQ SYBASE_IQ_LOAD=1 SIQ_BULK_OP=1
SYBASE_IQ_CESU-8=1 SYBASE_IQ_LOCKWAIT=600 SYBASE_IQ_BUFFER_SIZE=500000



as this exeeds the limit of 256 CHAR in SAP NetWeaver Versions until 7.50, it is almost not possible the activate the SSL/TLS option in lower Systems due to the limit in the Table DBCON.

 


the new DBACOCKPIT for IQ

As Flash is no longer available from Adobe since end of 2020, the SAP IQ COCKPIT cannot be used anymore as of now. If your Company is not Blocking Flash System Wide, simply use the Waterfox Browser to continue.

You can use the improved and extended IQ Monitoring with Transaction DBACOCKPIT.

Blog - enable SAP IQ for DBACOCKPIT

Note 3223681 – New features for DBACOCKPIT on SAP IQ (cumulative Release)
contains the TCI for SAP_BASIS releases 750 SP11-SP25 and 753 SP00-SP09
for SAP Basis 7.56 (BW/4 2021) the new DBACOCKPIT for IQ is part of the SAP Basis 7.56 SP03

 

 

  1. DBACOCKPIT - create/trigger IQ events

 

 

  1. DBACOCKPIT - check the IQ license

 

 

  1. DBACOCKPIT - check the IQ config file

 

 



the SAP BW(/4) nearline storage configuration

 

 

 

Blog - SAP-NLS Solution for SAP BW based on SAP IQ. 
For the SAP-NLS Implementation finally, you must call some transactions in the SAP BW(/4) backend:

DBCO => depending on the scenario additional work for SDA is necessary

 

    • RSDANLCON => create the NLS storage target

 

    • DBACOCKPIT => reuse the DBCO connection to monitor the Database within BW(/4)

 

    • RSOADSODTO => cold store usage with BW/4

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 



 

the SAP S/4 ILM Store configuration

 

 

 

Blog - SAP ILM based on SAP IQ Database
For the SAP ILM Implementation finally, you have to call some transactions in the SAP S/4 backend:

 

    • SICF => configure Web Services

 

    • ILMSTOREADM => ILM Store Administration

 

    • WEBGUI => for Web Dynpro only Functions, like SFW5 or AS_AFB

 

    • SARA => Archive Administration

 

    • SARI => Archive Information System



 

 

 

 

 

 

 



 

 


The needed files can be found in the Document - SAP First Guidance - Q - the easy SAP IQ Database Installer

    • please contact roland.kramer@first-guidance.com for a copy of the Document
    • a recording introducing Q (Q-CustomerCoffeeCorner.mp4)
    • an example logfile - nls.execution.status

 

 



 

Roland Kramer, SAP Senior Architect for Analytics at cobicon
@SAPFirstGuidance

“I have no special talent; I am only passionately curious.”

entry.title: Re: BTP CI-Invalid request received by HTTP proxy: An HTTP line is larger than 8192 bytes.
entry.content: Hello Ryan, yes it's right. length of the URL is more than 8192. now URL length is around 8273. How we could manage , if It required to add more entities?

entry.title: Blocking manual entry in sales order
entry.content:
Hello,

We need to block material to be saved on SO item created manually by the user.

However, when this material is a part of sales BOM, the system should not block SO processing.

I look for something more robust than a warning message (due to overall material block) every time this material is picked up, whether by the user or by the system.

We sell "father" KMATs which in some cases call in "sons" KMATs (we call them sub-KMATS) into dependent SO items (sales BOM after configuration).

We need the to prohibit the users from entering those sub-KMATS directly, and even worse, try to configure them.

Can you suggest me something?

Andrew

entry.title: Removing Data for Multiple Company Codes in SAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently researching data deletion processes within the SAP FI, MM, SD, CO, and PP modules. I have a specific scenario that I need help with:

A company in Russia has acquired a firm from Turkey, which operates with seven different company codes. These company codes have been successfully copied into the new system. However, the company now needs to delete all data related to six of these company codes.

I am looking for guidance on the best approach to achieve this, with a focus on the following modules(note that these modules are just examples):

  • FI (Financial Accounting) Module: How to delete customers, general ledger accounts, and vendors associated with the specific company codes.
  • MM (Materials Management) Module: How to delete purchasing documents related to the specific company codes.
  • SD (Sales and Distribution) Module: How to delete sales orders linked to the specific company codes.

What are the recommended steps and methods for performing these deletions? Any detailed instructions or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Process Performance Indicators in SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition
entry.content:
Please click on the images to see them in good quality

Dear Community,

Thanks for joining in!

In this blog, you will learn about independent Process Performance Indicators. Together with an example we will explain how you can effectively apply filters to apply a detailed root cause analysis.

*Access previous blogs:

  • Outline: Introducing Blog Series of SAP Signavio Process In... - SAP Community
  • Start page and four main pillars: Start page of SAP Signavio Process Insights, disco... - SAP Community
  • Blog 1: End-to-End processes: End-to-end Processes and modular processes in SAP ... - SAP Community
    • Deep Dive: End-to-End processes: Source to Pay: Deep dive: End-to-End processes with a closer look... - SAP Community
  • Blog 2: Lines of Business: Lines of Business (LoBs) and Value Drivers in SAP ... - SAP Community
  • Blog 3: Value Analysis: Value Analysis and potential monetary impact in SA... - SAP Community
  • Blog 4: Process Flows: Process Flows and blockers in SAP Signavio Process... - SAP Community
  • Blog 5 Correction Recommendations: Correction Recommendations in SAP Signavio Process... - SAP Community

Note: To gain the most value of this blog, we recommend reading Blog 1: End-to-End Processes: End-to-end Processes and modular processes in SAP ... - SAP Community and Blog 1.1 Deep Dive: Deep dive: End-to-End processes with a closer look... - SAP Community.

Introduction

After choosing the entry point of your analysis, like a particular end-to-end process or line of business, it's time to dive deeper into your process performance analysis using the provided performance indicators.


What is a process performance indicator?

In a nutshell, process performance indicators provide key metrics that quantify the performance of business processes. They're more granular than KPIs (which focus on the overall functioning of a company) and enable you to understand process performance as opposed to overall performance in your organization. They indicate performance at an operational level and are used to understand where optimization is required.

Internal and external Benchmark

One standout advantage is the opportunity for benchmarking in SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition for some of the PPIs that are available. It is a vital practice for organizations seeking to stay competitive and achieve excellence in their operations. By comparing your performance metrics with those of similar companies in the industry, you can gain valuable insights and identify areas for improvement. As a short note, industry benchmarking data is based on existing external data, gathered throughout the past years.

Example:

To illustrate benchmarking, we will demonstrate its application as followed, in the End-to-End processes / Source to pay area– All modular processes. As you can see, there is a yellow sticker mentioning benchmarking opportunities, as shown in the screenshot below.


Note: Once you master the navigation, you can browse faster into your analysis leveraging the top navigation bar:

By clicking on "Purchase order items created", this overview appears:

 

In this example, the system identified that only 2% purchase order items are created automatically, based on the total object count (83). As described in the overview, the automation rate puts the performance in the significantly low 25 percent compared to industry peers. We recommend you have a look at the available recommendations to move towards top performing companies.

Note: The industry benchmarking performance visualization divides the data into four groups, so called quartiles. It reflects how well your processes are compared to industry peers. Your performance is represented by a colored indicator and a dot on a scale from 0 to 100. The quartiles and 4 available colours indicate whether your performance is significantly below, below, above, or significantly above the benchmark.

 

Internal Company Benchmark


This section will display the top5 types plus “others”, the sum of the other types In this specific example , there are the only 4 types of “Object Count distribution” created for this specific PPI within this company processes. The brown colour indicates objects created manually, whereby the blue colour represents the objects created automatically.

Looking on the right table “Automation rate distribution” it is a logical conclusion that the first three document types have zero percentage automation rate as they are created manually, causing inefficiencies in your processes, which can be automated by applying the recommendations the system is proposing to you. Only for the document type “UB” exists a 67% automation rate.

At this point, it should be noted that you have the option of adding filters (picture below) that allow you to search through different factors, such as plant and item category. By looking into different factors, it offers insights into diverse process aspects, facilitating a comprehensive understanding and identification of optimization opportunities.

 

Dive Deep into Your Performance Analysis

After covering the benchmarking opportunities (internal and external) we will now investigate the detail list. The screenshot below represents the detail list of the performance indicator “Overdue and open Accounts Payable items” in the End-to-End process “Source to pay”. The detail list allows you to examine all business object instances impacted by what the performance indicator measures. In addition, you can download the data for further investigation.


Note: You may wonder why there are blank spaces in some business objects. The reason for that is the broad, yet limited scope of the discovery edition. Keep in mind that the full edition provides you with all data and filtering capabilities.

Monetary value:  At this point, it is important to mention that the full edition, SAP Signavio Process Insights, provides you with monetary value information. Seeing the monetary value of affected business objects while analyzing your data can help you to understand the financial impact of process inefficiencies and prioritize areas for improvement.

Apply filters for a detailed root cause analysis

Once you click on the blue bottom “Filters” shown in the previous screenshot, you will find this overview.


This overview represents the following filters Document type, Company code, and Fiscal year. When you add filters, they are always applied from left to right. This means that if you add a filter for selection and then select values for that filter, the available filter values for subsequent filters that you add for selection are dynamically adjusted depending on the filter values you've already selected.

Paying closer attention towards the filter “fiscal year” you can see that in year 2021 28,298 documents were created which need to be cleared. Viewing the details allows you to really dive deep and get comprehensive insights into the root causes of processes that cause inefficiencies.

Note: I actually also like to filter by "Due on", which gives me the capability to filter for a specific date, or a date range.

Do your selection based on the highest number of items involved:

 

Once the selection is made, you can export it into a .xls file for further offline investigation with experts within your organisation:


Recommendations at Process Performance Indicator level

As we have already mentioned in our previous blog 5 correction recommendations provide concrete information and instructions about specific steps your organization can take to resolve business process issues. They are derived automatically from the data ingested from your source system based on standard performance indicators.

Next to the Correction recommendations, you will find the recommendations for Innovations, such AI related to this specific Process Performance Indicator. We will speak more about Innovation Recommendations in our Blog.


Key takeaways

  • Process Performance Indicators (PPIs): PPIs quantify business process performance and are more detailed than KPIs.
  • Benchmarking: Benchmarking helps organizations stay competitive and achieve operational excellence. SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition enables you to compare your metrics with industry peers and benchmark internally to gain insights and identify improvement areas. (Industry benchmarking data is based on external data collected over the years).
  • Filters for Detailed Analysis: Filters can be added to search through different factors like plant and item category which supports in gaining comprehensive insights and identifying optimization opportunities.
  • Monetary Value: SAP Signavio Process Insights (full edition), provides additionally monetary value information. Seeing the monetary value of affected business objects while analyzing your data can help you to understand the financial impact of process inefficiencies and prioritize areas for improvement.
  • Root Cause Analysis with Filters: Filters allow for detailed root cause analysis.
  • Correction Recommendations: Offers concrete steps to resolve business process issues. Recommendations are derived from data based on standard performance indicators.

Looking ahead:

Next on the roadmap of the eight-part blog journey is Long-term improvements to Plan (Innovation recommendations).

In case you have any questions feel free to leave a comment in the comment section or reach out via email to: Signavio-Discovery@sap.com.

Request your free* SAP Signavio Process, Insights discovery edition analysis today: https://url.sap/discovery-edition
(*For SAP maintenance customers)

entry.title: Re: Tuned Profile Settings for Adaptive Server Linux
entry.content: The web page:

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM RFUI Design Mode in Personas is difficult to use
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback. Feature requests 1, 2 and 4 are features not supported yet. While I cannot promise that the features will be available soon I consider them as very valid end user feedback for future developments.

Feature request 3 we think is already available today. See in the title bar of the RF Design Mode in SAP GUI for HTML on following example screenshot.

Logical transaction: INSTBI
Step: INSTBS
Function Group: /SCWM/SAPLRF_INQUIRY_PM
Screen No: 0310

Best regards,

Matthias Keller
SAP EWM development team

entry.title: Re: Call custom screen and popup in SAP Radio Frequency(R...
entry.content: Hi, Thanks for your response. Yes, I created the screen into HTML template and am getting this error in browser. 500 Internal Server Error Template interpretation terminated, template not found.

entry.title: Re: Sap Authorization Audit Readiness & Critical Access Monitoring!!!
entry.content:
Thanks Shivkumar,
Hoping you get answers now!  I see the content.
Best Regards, Wallace

entry.title: Re: Revaluation of a purchase order price due to a material price change
entry.content: Added procure tag, Please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: How to get ESLL-MWSKZ field given ESSR-LBLNI?
entry.content:
I'm trying to see what Tax Code (ESLL-MWSKZ) was used given a list of service entry sheet numbers (ESSR-LBLNI). 

SE16N table ESSR - I enter the Service Entry Sheet number into ESSR-LBNI and I get the associated ESSR-PACKNO. Then, SE16N table ESLL and enter the ESSR-PACKNO into ESLL-PACKNO and get an output... but ESLL-MWSKZ displayed is blank!

Manually looking I can clearly see that the Tax Code for the service entry posting not blank, and it's supposed to be ESLL-MWKZ... but viewing table ESLL, pulling it up the way described above, it's blank in the table output display!

Any help would be appreciated!

ESLL display from with entering PACKNO from ESSR into PACKNO for ESLL:

what the tax code actually is, when I display the entry sheet:

entry.title: Re: administrator button is not available in configuratio...
entry.content:
This administrator button is no longer available with SAP S/4 screen for FB50,60, 70 NJOY tcodes. Hence it should be accommodated via a screen variant in SHD0.

Please follow the SAP note 0001744839 for further details

entry.title: Re: Last Modified by in MDF portlet
entry.content:
Dear muruganandh_v ,

This is currently not supported for custom MDF UIs. You can see all details in this KBA.

I hope this helps!

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Karen Perez
